concepts.finding: Content-based music recommendation using deep neural networks on audio features, metadata, and user listening history. Joint embedding of audio content (spectrograms via CNN) and collaborative signals. Key challenge: bridging the semantic gap between low-level audio features and high-level user preferences.
concepts.implication: Content-based embedding approaches are critical for cold-start items/keywords without interaction history. Multi-modal embedding (audio features + metadata) parallels multi-modal keyword features (text + frequency + entity type).
concepts.open_question: For keywords, what constitutes the "content" signal? Text embeddings of the keyword itself, or document embeddings of pages where the keyword appears?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Hybrid content+context keyword embeddings outperform either pure content (keyword text) or pure context (co-occurrence) embeddings for intent clustering.
